'''鈭歴h-b-ch-s''' ('''kashabchesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaffle|jaffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaffle|jaffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-b-ch-s
|-
! Lemma
| kashabchesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishabchesoko|thishabchesoko]] || [[word:jishabchesoko|jishabchesoko]] || [[word:shishabchesoko|shishabchesoko]] || [[word:kishabchesoko|kishabchesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushabchesoko|thuthushabchesoko]] || [[word:jujushabchesoko|jujushabchesoko]] || [[word:shushushabchesoko|shushushabchesoko]] || [[word:kukushabchesoko|kukushabchesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushabchesoko|thushabchesoko]] || [[word:jushabchesoko|jushabchesoko]] || [[word:shushabchesoko|shushabchesoko]] || [[word:kushabchesoko|kushabchesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushabchesoko|thushabchesoko]] || [[word:jushabchesoko|jushabchesoko]] || [[word:shushabchesoko|shushabchesoko]] || [[word:kushabchesoko|kushabchesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshabchesoko|theshabchesoko]] || [[word:jeshabchesoko|jeshabchesoko]] || [[word:sheshabchesoko|sheshabchesoko]] || [[word:keshabchesoko|keshabchesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshabchesoko|thothoshabchesoko]] || [[word:jojoshabchesoko|jojoshabchesoko]] || [[word:shoshoshabchesoko|shoshoshabchesoko]] || [[word:kokoshabchesoko|kokoshabchesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshabchesoko|thoshabchesoko]] || [[word:joshabchesoko|joshabchesoko]] || [[word:shoshabchesoko|shoshabchesoko]] || [[word:koshabchesoko|koshabchesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshabchesoko|thoshabchesoko]] || [[word:joshabchesoko|joshabchesoko]] || [[word:shoshabchesoko|shoshabchesoko]] || [[word:koshabchesoko|koshabchesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shabchesoko|th忙shabchesoko]] || [[word:j忙shabchesoko|j忙shabchesoko]] || [[word:sh忙shabchesoko|sh忙shabchesoko]] || [[word:k忙shabchesoko|k忙shabchesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashabchesoko|thathashabchesoko]] || [[word:jajashabchesoko|jajashabchesoko]] || [[word:shashashabchesoko|shashashabchesoko]] || [[word:kakashabchesoko|kakashabchesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashabchesoko|thashabchesoko]] || [[word:jashabchesoko|jashabchesoko]] || [[word:shashabchesoko|shashabchesoko]] || [[word:kashabchesoko|kashabchesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashabchesoko|thashabchesoko]] || [[word:jashabchesoko|jashabchesoko]] || [[word:shashabchesoko|shashabchesoko]] || [[word:kashabchesoko|kashabchesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shashabchesithi|shashabchesithi]] || [[word:shashabchesiji|shashabchesiji]] || [[word:shashabchesishi|shashabchesishi]] || [[word:shashabchesiki|shashabchesiki]]
